vocab.sentence: Spring is a warm season.
How is the weather today?
It was rainy yesterday.
The road is wet after the rain.
It is sunny in Kaohsiung today.
It was cloudy this morning.
It is windy by the sea.
It is snowy in the mountains.
We often travel in spring.
Summer is hot in Taiwan.
The weather is cool in autumn.
It is cold in winter.
The sky is dark before a storm.
I felt cold last night.
The air is fresh after the rain.
Rain is common in summer.
It got dark at six.
I forgot my umbrella at home.
Take an umbrella with you.
The child is afraid of thunder.
We had heavy rain last night.
A shower came in the afternoon.
The news reported heavy rain.
I am under the weather today.
The sea level is getting higher.
Floods can bring danger.
We need to fix the problem soon.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們得趕快解決這個問題。

vocab.sentence: They built a new bridge.
My school is not far from here.
The fisherman works by the sea.
The sky became dark quickly.
The baby cried during the storm.
They live near the river.
Stay safe during heavy rain.
Trees protect the land from wind.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 樹木保護土地免受強風吹襲。

vocab.sentence: We should care for nature.
Dark clouds are above us.
Heavy rain led to a flood.

tips.label: 問天氣
tips.text: 用 How is/was the weather ...? 或 What is/was the weather like ...? 來問天氣。

tips.label: 回答天氣
tips.text: 用 It is/was + 天氣形容詞回答，例如 It was rainy. 注意這裡用 It，不用 This 或 That。

tips.label: 下雨與下雪
tips.text: 描述下雨或下雪可用 It rains/rained/snows/snowed + a lot/a little；也可用 There is/was 或 We/They have + rain/snow。

notes.title: How 與 What 詢問天氣
notes.rule: How + be 動詞 + the weather + 地點副詞 + 時間副詞？／What + be 動詞 + the weather + like + 地點副詞 + 時間副詞？
notes.description: How 的問句不能加 like；What 的問句一定要加 like。be 動詞依時間改成 is 或 was。
examples: How is the weather in Taipei today?
What was the weather like in Hsinchu last night?
How was the weather in Australia in summer?

notes.title: 回答天氣狀況
notes.rule: It + is / was + 天氣形容詞。
notes.description: 談天氣時用代名詞 It 代替 the weather。今天、現在等現在時間用 is；昨天、上週等過去時間用 was。
examples: It was rainy and wet yesterday.

notes.title: 描述雨量與雪量
notes.rule: It + rains/rained/snows/snowed + a lot/a little + 地點副詞 + 時間副詞。
notes.description: rain 與 snow 在這個句型是動詞；現在習慣或事實用 rains/snows，過去發生的事用 rained/snowed。a lot 表示很多，a little 表示一點點。
examples: It rains a lot in Taipei in winter.
It snowed a little in the mountains yesterday.

notes.title: There is/was 與 have 描述雨雪
notes.rule: There + is/was + a lot of/much/a little + rain/snow。／We/They + have + a lot of/much/a little + rain/snow。
notes.description: rain 與 snow 在這裡是不可數名詞，不能說 many rains。用 there 表示某地有雨雪；用 we 或 they 表示某地的人有雨雪。
examples: There was a lot of rain last summer.
We have much rain in spring.
They had a little snow in January.

quiz.question: ___ is the weather in Taipei today?
quiz.hint: 詢問天氣可用 How is the weather ...?

quiz.question: What ___ the weather like in Tainan yesterday?
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去時間，be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: How ___ the weather in Kaohsiung last night?
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間，主詞 the weather 搭配 was。

quiz.question: What is the weather ___ in Hualien today?
quiz.hint: What 問天氣時，the weather 後面要接 like。

quiz.question: A: How is the weather today? B: ___ sunny.
quiz.hint: 回答天氣用 It is + 形容詞。

quiz.question: A: What was the weather like yesterday? B: It ___ rainy.
quiz.hint: 昨天的天氣用 It was + 形容詞。

quiz.question: It ___ very windy in Penghu last week.
quiz.hint: last week 是過去時間，It 後用 was。

quiz.question: ___ the weather like in Japan in winter?
quiz.hint: What is the weather like ...? 是正確問句。

quiz.question: It ___ a lot in Taipei in spring.
quiz.hint: 描述現在的習慣或事實，It 後的 rain 要加 s。

quiz.question: It ___ a little last night.
quiz.hint: last night 表示過去發生的事，rain 用過去式 rained。

quiz.question: It often ___ in the mountains in January.
quiz.hint: often 表示習慣，It 後的 snow 用第三人稱單數 snows。

quiz.question: It ___ heavily yesterday afternoon.
quiz.hint: yesterday afternoon 是過去時間，要用 rained。

quiz.question: There ___ much rain in Taiwan last summer.
quiz.hint: rain 是不可數名詞，過去時間搭配 There was。

quiz.question: There ___ a lot of snow in the mountains now.
quiz.hint: snow 是不可數名詞，now 表示現在，用 There is。

quiz.question: We ___ a lot of rain in summer.
quiz.hint: 主詞 We 是複數，現在式用 have。

quiz.question: They ___ much snow there last winter.
quiz.hint: last winter 是過去時間，have 的過去式是 had。

quiz.question: How ___ the weather in your hometown in summer?
quiz.hint: the weather 是單數，夏天的一般情況用 is。

quiz.question: What ___ the weather like in Taichung this morning?
quiz.hint: this morning 若已過去，問早上的天氣用 was。

quiz.question: A: How was the weather? B: ___ cloudy and cold.
quiz.hint: 回答天氣狀況用 It was + 形容詞。

quiz.question: What is the weather like ___ Taitung today?
quiz.hint: 城市前通常用介系詞 in。

quiz.question: It ___ snowy in the mountains yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去，It 後用 was。

quiz.question: It ___ cold and windy today.
quiz.hint: today 表示現在，It 後用 is。

quiz.question: It ___ a lot in my hometown every summer.
quiz.hint: every summer 表示習慣，It 後用 rains。

quiz.question: It ___ only a little in the mountains last night.
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間，snow 用 snowed。

quiz.question: There ___ a little rain here today.
quiz.hint: rain 是不可數名詞，today 用 There is。

quiz.question: There ___ much snow in this city last year.
quiz.hint: last year 是過去時間，snow 是不可數名詞，用 was。

quiz.question: My parents ___ a lot of rain in their town.
quiz.hint: My parents 是複數主詞，現在式用 have。

quiz.question: We ___ a little snow there last January.
quiz.hint: last January 表示過去，have 用 had。

quiz.question: ___ was the weather in Korea last winter?
quiz.hint: How was the weather ...? 用來詢問過去的天氣。

quiz.question: What was the weather ___ yesterday?
quiz.hint: What was the weather like? 是固定句型。

quiz.question: How is the weather ___ the beach today?
quiz.hint: at the beach 表示在海灘，用介系詞 at。

quiz.question: A: What was the weather like? B: ___ wet after the shower.
quiz.hint: 過去的天氣回答用 It was。

quiz.question: It ___ very hard last night.
quiz.hint: last night 表示過去，動詞用 rained。

quiz.question: It ___ a lot in this city every winter.
quiz.hint: every winter 表示習慣，It 後用 snows。

quiz.question: There ___ a lot of rain yesterday.
quiz.hint: rain 是不可數名詞，昨天用 There was。

quiz.question: There ___ much snow in the park now.
quiz.hint: snow 是不可數名詞，now 用 There is。

quiz.question: They ___ much rain in spring.
quiz.hint: They 是複數主詞，現在式用 have。

quiz.question: We ___ a lot of snow last year.
quiz.hint: last year 是過去時間，have 的過去式是 had。

quiz.question: It ___ rainy and dark this morning.
quiz.hint: this morning 的情況已過去，It 後用 was。

quiz.question: What ___ the weather like in your city now?
quiz.hint: now 表示現在，What is the weather like ...?

quiz.question: How ___ the weather in Australia in summer?
quiz.hint: 詢問一般情況時，the weather 搭配 is。

quiz.question: It ___ rainy yesterday, so I took an umbrella.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去，It 後用 was。

quiz.question: It usually ___ in this area in July.
quiz.hint: usually 表示習慣，It 後的 rain 用 rains。

quiz.question: It ___ a little in the mountains last weekend.
quiz.hint: last weekend 是過去時間，snow 用 snowed。

quiz.question: There ___ much rain in this town in summer.
quiz.hint: rain 是不可數名詞，描述一般情況用 There is。

quiz.question: There ___ a little snow here last January.
quiz.hint: last January 表示過去，snow 是不可數名詞，用 was。

quiz.question: We ___ much rain in Taiwan in summer.
quiz.hint: We 是複數主詞，現在式用 have。

quiz.question: They ___ a lot of snow there last winter.
quiz.hint: last winter 是過去時間，have 用 had。

quiz.question: What ___ the weather like in Taipei yesterday?
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去，What was the weather like ...?

quiz.question: It ___ a lot in the mountains every January.
quiz.hint: every January 表示習慣，It 後用 snows。

grammar.sentence: How is the weather in your city?

It is cold and snowy there.
